title: Staff: Poline Mirithu
display_label: Poline Mirithu — Grants and Contracts Manager
staff_title: Grants and Contracts Manager, Office of Research Administration
previous_roles: Compliance Manager at a prominent local law firm
content:
Ms. Poline Mirithu is the Grants and Contracts Manager, Office of Research Administration.

Office: Tyler Hall, Suite 304. Phone: 443-885-2503. Email: poline.mirithu@morgan.edu.

Ms. Poline Mirithu serves as a Grants and Contracts Manager for the Office of Research Administration at Morgan State University.

In this role she reviews proposal preparation and submissions to federal and state government agencies, universities, and other entities.

Before joining Morgan State, Ms. Mirithu worked as a Compliance Manager at a prominent local law firm, where she gained extensive experience ensuring adherence to regulatory standards and organizational policies.

She brings a wealth of knowledge in compliance and organizational management, enhancing the efficiency and effectiveness of research administration at Morgan State.

Education: BS, University of Nairobi.

Certifications: Certified Scrum Master (CSM) (Scrum Alliance.
